store_information_desc: Store name, phone, address, and logo.
users_permissions_desc: Prepared for future staff access levels.
backup_desc: Prepared for future cloud sync and backup.
products_page_desc: Manage products, prices, and stock levels.
customers_page_desc: Manage customer records for invoices and follow-up.
sales_page_desc: Create invoices and review recent sales.
no_products_desc: Add your first product to start selling.
no_customers_desc: Create customer records for invoices and follow-up.
invoice_empty: No items added to the invoice yet.
no_sales_desc: Create your first invoice from this page.
no_low_stock_items: No low stock items right now.
no_suppliers_desc: Add supplier records for purchasing and follow-up.
no_expenses_desc: Track electricity, transport, rent, and other expenses.
search_inventory: Search inventory by name, code, or category...
inventory_page_desc: Review all products, stock levels, and inventory value.
pos_checkout_desc: Add products quickly, adjust quantities, and save the invoice in one place.
invoice_ready_desc: The invoice has been saved. You can print it now or later from the recent invoices list.
pdf_action_failed: PDF action failed on this device.
product_code_not_found: Product code was not found or the item is out of stock.
backup_restore_desc: Copy your data as JSON and restore it later on another device.
backup_restore_failed: Backup restore failed. Please check the pasted JSON.
backup_download_not_supported: File download is not supported on this device right now.
backup_preview_desc: You can download a JSON file, preview it, or restore it from a file or pasted text.
discount_exceeds_subtotal: Discount cannot be greater than subtotal.
sale_validation_failed: Could not save invoice. Please recheck stock, quantities, and discount.
security_pin_enabled: PIN protection is enabled on app startup.
pin_help: Use 4 to 8 digits. Keep this PIN safe; it protects local access to the app.
pin_invalid: PIN must be 4 to 8 matching digits.
enter_pin_to_continue: Enter your security PIN to continue.
invalid_non_negative_number: Enter a number that is zero or greater
pos_terminal_desc: Scan barcode, build a fast cart, complete payment, and print the receipt.
scan_barcode_hint: Scan with barcode reader or type the code then press Enter
stock_limit_reached: Stock limit reached for this product.
data_management_desc: Reset all business records and start with an empty database. Store profile and PIN are kept.
reset_all_data_confirm: This will delete all products, customers except Walk-in, invoices, suppliers, expenses, and reset invoice numbering. This cannot be undone. Create a backup first if needed.
all_data_reset: All business data has been reset.
name: Name
search_products_pro: Search name, SKU, barcode, brand, supplier...
track_stock_desc: Disable it for services or non-stock items.
active_product_desc: Inactive products stay saved but can be filtered out.
invalid_number: Enter a valid zero or positive number
lan_sync_desc: Sync this device with another Store Manager device on the same local network.
auto_sync_desc: Automatically push local changes and pull host updates every 30 seconds.
host_mode_desc: Run this device as the main host for other devices on the local network.
lan_sync_alpha_note: Auto-sync note: clients push local changes and pull host updates every 30 seconds. Keep Sync now for manual troubleshooting.
cancel_return_confirm: Cancel/return invoice {invoice} and restore its stock?
signin_hint: Sign in with your username and password. Default first login: admin / admin123
cloud_host_auto_desc: The HOST checks Vercel for remote requests and pushes official changes automatically.
web_cloud_lan_desc: Web build uses Cloud API + Neon. LAN Host/Client is Desktop only.
auto_cloud_client_desc: Automatically pushes local changes quickly and polls cloud using the interval below.
reset_sync_setup_confirm: This will only reset Host/Client sync setup. Business data will stay on this device. Restart the app to see the setup screen again.
system_foundation_desc: Store, branch, device role, app role, and sync mode.
built_in_admin_desc: The Admin role always has all permissions and cannot be edited or deleted. Default first login is admin / admin123. Change it immediately.
sync_setup_desc: Choose Host for the main device with clean local data. Choose Client to copy the full database from the Host, then sync automatically online/offline.
host_ip_help: On Host this can stay as 0.0.0.0 or your LAN IP. On Client enter the Host LAN IP.
pairing_token_help: Use the same token on Host and Client.
connecting_cloning: Connecting to host and cloning data...
cloud_tenant_id: Cloud tenant ID / future Neon tenant
host_heartbeat_stale: Host heartbeat is stale. The Host is probably offline.
no_host_heartbeat: No Host heartbeat was found. Start the Host device once to publish its status.
purchases_desc: Create purchase invoices, receive stock, and keep supplier buying history.
receive_now_desc: When enabled, product quantities and costs are updated immediately.
cancel_purchase_desc: Cancel this purchase? If it was received, stock will be reversed.
quantity_delta_help: Use positive numbers to add stock and negative numbers to remove stock.
